title: uragoga capitellata
intro: Uragoga capitellata, also known as the "Bitter Apple" or "Bitter Passion Flower", is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Uragoga capitellata include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Uragoga capitellata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
